title: Abhor What is Evil
description:
"Little somthin I cooked up"
Dungeon crawling, horror, & plenty vanilla plus.
body: This modpack is not meant to be a profesionally made pack for thousands to download. It is simply made for friends to enjoy together. This modpack focusus on vanilla plus or stylized mods including dungeons, enhanced worlds, a fright every now and then, weapon forging, and more. Enjoy. Round of applause for modrinth.
